Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.audio

Class FlixelSoundSource

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.audio.FlixelSoundSource
All Implemented Interfaces:
FlixelSource<FlixelSoundSource>
public final class FlixelSoundSource extends Object implements FlixelSource<FlixelSoundSource>
Cached sound "source" (asset) that can spawn fresh FlixelSound instances on demand.

Do not cache FlixelSound playback objects directly: a playback object has mutable state (volume/pan/time/playing) and cannot be safely shared across callers or overlapping plays.
